title: HEX BOOST
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on mobile and PC launcher performance. Released for celebrating 500 subscribers.
body:
⚡️ **SymbolHex EDITION – Performance+ (Fabric)**  
A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on FPS, stability, and smooth gameplay — without breaking the vanilla feel.Just install this version and play, if you are having issues/querries while installing or having crashes please contact on discord! 

🧠 **Optimized With:**  
Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, and MemoryLeakFix, many more.....!  

🚀 **Features:**  
- Up to 3x-4x FPS boost compared to vanilla  
- Faster world load & reduced stutter  
- Clean vanilla visuals (no unnecessary shaders)  
- Includes QoL mods: Inventory Tweaks, mouse tweaks

🧩 **Recommended Specs:**  
- RAM(PC): 4–8 GB  | RAM(Mobile Launchers): 4-8 RAM
- Please try increase ram allocation asa high as possible, just dont break your device
- Works on low & mid-end PCs also on mobile launchers!

🎯 **Tested On:**  
Windows Laptop (i5, average 700-800 FPS)

❔ **have query/want support:**
 Join Discord: https://discord.com/invite/FcVnGWCacs
